meta.title: Banlieuwood — The collaborative filmmaking game
meta.description: Write a short film together. 5 to 30 players on their phones. In class, with family, or with friends. Free, no account needed.
meta.ogTitle: Banlieuwood — Write a short film together
meta.ogDescription: The game where 5 to 30 players build a film story together, each on their phone. Free, no sign-up required.
meta.twitterDescription: 5 to 30 players write a short film together on their phones. Cinema EdTech.

landing.heroSubtitle: 5 to 30 players, each on their phone. In class, with family, or with friends.
landing.step1Desc: Choose a genre, a theme, and a level. A 6-character code is generated.
landing.step2Desc: Share the code or QR. Each player joins on their phone, no sign-up needed.
landing.step3Desc: Answer questions, vote, and build your story collectively.

join.title: Join a game
join.invalidCode: Invalid code, please check and try again
join.noName: Please enter a name or nickname

play.waitingSubtitle: The facilitator will launch the question soon...
play.pausedSubtitle: The facilitator has paused the game...
play.doneSubtitle: The game is over. Thank you!
play.question: Question

session.createSubtitle: Set up your game before welcoming players

footer.tagline: The collaborative filmmaking game. 5 to 30 players on their phones.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Banlieuwood — Made with passion in Paris
